episodes.title: “PM Is Panicked Over Adani, Epstein Cases” – Rahul Gandhi Slams Modi in Lok Sabha
episodes.description:
Lok Sabha Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi said, “The PM is saying there is no need to panic. But he himself is panicked for completely different reasons – the Adani case and Epstein issues.” Gandhi criticized Prime Minister Modi for urging calm while allegedly being personally concerned about ongoing controversies, raising questions over leadership and accountability in Parliament.

#RahulGandhi #PMModi #AdaniCase #EpsteinCase #LokSabhaDebate #IndianPolitics #ParliamentNews #PoliticalDebate #IndiaNews #OppositionCriticism

Founded in Lahore by Sardar Dyal Singh Majithia and now published from Chandigarh, The Tribune has evolved into a modern multimedia news platform—bringing the power of credible journalism to the digital generation.

This is where tradition meets technology. On our official YouTube channel, we bring the news to life through video—fast, direct, and engaging.
